name: add-fold-function
instruction: Add a new function `longest_name(users: List[User]) -> String` that returns the name of the user with the longest name. Use `list.fold`. If the list is empty, return an empty string.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.fold(xs, init, fn(acc, x) => result)` reduces a list, `string.len(s)` returns string length
